calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: WPD GAP-8 validation -- MECH-272 routing-gate downstream consumer
items.note: GAP-8: validates use_mech272_routing_consumer flag gates mean_anchor in SleepLoopManager._run_cycle(). ARM_0 (consumer OFF) -> sws_anchor_weight_applied==1.0; ARM_1 (consumer ON) -> ~=0.6. C3 requires act_with_split_obs loop to populate world_experience_buffer (sense() alone does not run _e1_tick). Smoke C1/C2/C3 PASS 2026-05-15.
